_comment_github: provider=github uses the gh CLI (run `gh auth login` once). Repos are owner/repo. me is resolved from gh if left empty.
_comment_azure: For provider=azure instead, set these (repos are just the repo name) and run `az login`. The Azure adapter is a documented stub in this build — see docs/provider-contract.md.
_comment_targets: The watch list. Each target is one card. kind is pipeline | environment | release. repository is optional (falls back to defaultRepository). For a pipeline, workflow is the workflow file name or its display name, and branch is optional (defaults to the repo's default branch). For an environment, name is the environment (e.g. production). For a release, nothing else is needed.
_comment_autodiscover: Instead of listing targets by hand, set autoDiscover true to watch every active workflow + every environment in autoDiscoverRepository (defaults to defaultRepository). Discovered targets are merged with any explicit ones above.
_comment_drift: An environment or release this many commits behind its base branch counts as behind (the warn edge that fires the one-off notification). Minimum 1.
_comment_notify: Desktop notifications are automatic per-OS. For an optional phone push, set an ntfy topic (a long private string) and subscribe the ntfy app to it.
